comment: I had the BEST day ever!! 🐾✨ I showed off my brainpower with some super fun trick training (I’m basically a genius now 😎🎓) and then burned off all that energy with tons of playtime with my friends! 🐕💨 From zoomies to silly games, I made sure to keep the fun going all day long. Can’t wait to come back and do it all again! 🐾💛 My demand barking was getting bad today.My trainers needed to give me constant breaks and walks to help keep my brain engaged
rawActivities: played with as many buddies as possible
